name: Oriental Wings
recipeInstructions:
1. Remove tips and cut the wings into 2 pieces.
2. Dip each wing in beaten eggs and let excess egg drip off for a few minutes.
3. Coat each wing evenly with seasoned flour mixture (flour, garlic powder, and pepper) until fully coated.
4. Heat oil to 350-360°F (175-180°C) or until a drop of the egg mixture sizzles on the surface when dropped into the oil.
5. Deep fry wings in batches until golden brown and crispy. Drain on paper towels.
6. In a bowl, mix equal parts teriyaki sauce and honey.
7. Brush or marinate each wing with the sauce mixture while still hot but allowing excess to drip off before serving.
8. Allow wings to marinate for 5-10 minutes before serving hot.
